Climate Action, Peace and Democracy Director Oslo, Norway POSTING DATE03/19/2026 This is a rare opportunity to shape how NORCAP advances climate action, peace, democracy and human rights at a global level—translating ambitions into tangible change for people and partners on the frontlines of crisis. If you want to lead a highly skilled section where your ideas genuinely influence policy, partnerships and NORCAP Assignments worldwide, we invite you to apply. Head of Unit African Multilateral Partnerships Oslo, Norway (Hybrid) POSTING DATE03/20/2026 The African Multilateral Partnerships Unit works strategically to invest in regional, and thereby also national, capacity to support African visions of an integrated, prosperous, and peaceful Africa driven by its own citizens. Head of Unit Peace and Democracy Oslo, Norway (Hybrid) POSTING DATE03/20/2026 The Head of Peace and Democracy Unit works strategically to invest in the international community and national stakeholders capacity and ability to promote and protect democracy and credible elections, human rights, rule of law, and peace. This includes line management of unit members, providing operational and technical support, and providing strategic direction, as well as programme and policy development and implementation aimed at strengthening responses, systems, and partnerships.
